name: filter-by-builtin-kind-many
query: env | manifest | filter(/kind | eq(:builtin)) | count | gt(40)

name: filter-by-vec-reducer-category
query: env | manifest | filter(/category | eq(:vec-reducer)) | count | gt(5)

name: filter-by-vec-transformer-category
query: env | manifest | filter(/category | eq(:vec-transformer)) | count | gt(5)

name: names-are-sorted-asc
query: env | manifest * /name | as(:got) | got | sort | eq(got)

name: manifest-after-let
query: let(:myBinding, 42) | env | manifest | filter(/kind | eq(:conduit)) | count

name: manifest-after-as
query: 42 | as(:captured) | env | manifest | filter(/kind | eq(:snapshot)) | count

name: manifest-after-use
query: {:myConst 42} | use | env | manifest | filter(/kind | eq(:value)) | filter(/name | eq("myConst")) | count

name: conduit-shows-up-with-name
query: let(:foo, mul(2)) | env | manifest | filter(/kind | eq(:conduit)) | first | /name

name: snapshot-shows-up-with-value
query: 42 | as(:bar) | env | manifest | filter(/kind | eq(:snapshot)) | first | /value

name: every-builtin-has-docs-vec
query: env | manifest | filter(/kind | eq(:builtin)) | filter(/docs | empty) | count

name: every-builtin-has-non-empty-first-doc
query: env | manifest | filter(/kind | eq(:builtin)) | filter(/docs | first | eq("") | not) | count | gt(40)

name: manifest-via-table-runs
query: env | manifest | filter(/category | eq(:arith)) | table | eq("") | not
